name_cn:
Grey hand-rubbed leather·Accordion bag 26cm
The most elegant Sac de Day series, a timeless classic. Exquisite hand-rubbed cowhide with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! The 26cm version comes with a middle divider and can be removed to serve as a clutch. The shoulder strap is adjustable, allowing you to choose the length yourself! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the style of understated luxury~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(26cm version comes with a middle divider)
